summary: The diff modifies Navbar.tsx and Footer.tsx to display the official DMTI logo image. Both components now reference /assets/generated/dmti-logo.dim_400x160.png with appropriate sizing (h-10 in Navbar, h-14 in Footer). However, the logo file itself does not appear as an added file in the diff, raising a question about whether the actual image asset was placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/.

missing_requirements.requirement: The uploaded logo image (dmti-logo.png) must be present in frontend/public/assets/generated/
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added files. The image asset (dmti-logo.dim_400x160.png) is referenced in both components but does not appear as a new or added file in the diff summary. This means the actual image file may not have been committed/added.
